item.title: File permission mode literals scattered across 3+ files
item.intent: File permission modes have a single source of truth in config/defaults.ts. No bare octal literals appear outside that file.
item.description: The octal literal 0o600 appears as a magic number in src/design/configure/writer.ts:60 (mode: 0o644 default parameter), src/build/launcher/preflight.ts:161 (mode !== 0o600), src/operate/doctor/checks.ts:159 (mode !== 0o600). The constants MODE_0600 and MODE_0644 are already defined locally in src/secure/credentials/credential-store.ts and env-store.ts — but those definitions are not exported or reused. Same pattern as BUG-011 (Gateway port) and BUG-025 (Ollama URL). Steps: (1) add FILE_MODE_SECRET = 0o600, FILE_MODE_CONFIG = 0o644, FILE_MODE_EXEC = 0o755 constants to src/config/defaults.ts; (2) replace magic octal literals in writer.ts, preflight.ts, doctor/checks.ts with imports; (3) remove the duplicate local MODE_0600 constants from credential-store.ts and env-store.ts, import from defaults.ts instead; (4) run full test suite. Scope: ~5 files, no logic change.
